name: Install Fonts
description: Install fonts from multiple sources: Nerd Fonts by name, arbitrary direct URLs, and GitHub release assets. Can be used inside a devcontainer or run directly on a host machine.

nerd_fonts.description: Comma-separated Nerd Fonts archive names to install (e.g. Meslo,JetBrainsMono,FiraCode). Set to empty string to skip Nerd Font downloads.

font_urls.description: Comma-separated direct font URLs. Font files (.ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2) and archives (.tar.xz, .tar.gz, .tgz, .zip) are downloaded and installed. Fonts are deduplicated by PostScript name against already-installed fonts.

gh_release_fonts.description: Comma-separated GitHub slugs (owner/repo or owner/repo@tag). Without a tag, the latest release is used; with a tag that specific release is used. All font and archive assets from the release are installed, deduplicated by PostScript name.

font_dir.description: Font installation directory. Leave empty to auto-detect: root/container -> /usr/share/fonts; Linux user -> $XDG_DATA_HOME/fonts; macOS user -> ~/Library/Fonts.

p10k_fonts.description: Also install the four Powerlevel10k-specific MesloLGS NF fonts from romkatv/powerlevel10k-media.

overwrite.description: When a font with the same PostScript name is already installed, overwrite it instead of skipping. Default is to skip and log.
